children.text:
Introducing the 'Core' feed!
You can now filter app content to highlight articles written by our editors. Select the 'Core' view from the drop-down menu or set it is as default in the Settings.

Other changes:

- Change Dark Background to true black (helpful for OLED screens)
- Removes Play Services App Invites functionality
- Update SDK to Nougat
- Open Source Attribution
- Video list fixed to handle click properly
